While looking at available assemblies to upload data, I noticed a number of TEST genomes that were only for debugging on our end.

**To Reproduce**
This file lists a bunch of DAS requests: https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/blob/dev/tool-data/shared/ucsc/ucsc_build_sites.txt.sample
and the genome-test reference should at minimum be removed. You can also use our API instead to obtain the list of supported genomes:
https://api.genome.ucsc.edu/list/ucscGenomes
